data.title: AIXC expanding team to support growth of AIxC Hub ecosystem; announces strategic partnerships.LOS ANGELES, Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: In light of exceeding expectations in the performance of the AIXC Hub, AIxCrypto Holdings (NASDAQ: AIXC) has revealed plans to bolster its team strategically. The focus of this expansion will be on enhancing compliance measures, fostering scalable growth, and establishing partnerships with institutions. This move comes as the company aims to capitalize on its recent success. As of January 23, 2026, the initiative to expand the team in key areas indicates a proactive approach to sustaining and further enhancing the company's momentum.

data.title: US bank lobby prioritizing halting stablecoin yields for 2026; focus amid potential legislation before midterms.
data.description: The American Bankers Association has made the issue of stablecoin yields its primary focus as Congress aims to finalize legislation on cryptocurrency market structure before the upcoming midterm elections. This development underscores the growing importance of addressing stablecoin interest rates within the financial sector.

data.title: SHOT Show 2026 in Las Vegas drew hunters, shooters, and industry pros from US, Canada, Europe, highlighting ApexVision Performance.Character count: 108.
data.description: A recent event held in Las Vegas on January 22, 2026, drew significant attention as one of the leading shooting and hunting exhibitions in North America and globally. The SHOT Show, known for its size and reach, successfully brought together hunters, shooters, and industry experts not only from the United States but also from Canada and Europe. The show served as a valuable platform for a wide range of participants seeking networking opportunities, with many attendees making the journey from overseas to engage in sourcing activities and knowledge sharing. It showcased the strong interest and participation in the hunting and shooting sector, attracting a diverse audience from different regions.

data.title: LINK expected to reach $14.50-$15.00 by January end, with medium-term forecast at $15.50-$16.50. Bullish breakout at $14.52.
data.description: Summary of LINK Price Prediction:In the short term, analysts are predicting a target range of $14.50 to $15.00 for the next week. Looking ahead to the medium term, a forecast of $15.50 to $16.50 has been suggested for the next month. The bullish breakout level is set at $14.52, indicating a potentially positive trend. It is emphasized that maintaining critical support levels will be crucial for the future performance of the market.

data.title: Bitcoin's profit cycle dips below $90,000 for the first time since 2023, indicating negative trends in on-chain realized profits.
data.description: The drop in Bitcoin's value to below $90,000 has caused on-chain realized profit metrics to enter negative territory, marking a level not seen since the previous bear market.

data.title: Registration open for Clarion Safety Systems' free 2026 webinar on maximizing on-product warnings. MILFOR, Pa., Jan. 23 /PRNewswire
data.description: A virtual event will delve into symbol-based warnings, standards unification, and the significance of warnings in contemporary equipment design. Clarion Safety Systems revealed that registration is available for its upcoming no-cost live webinar. The event will discuss how to optimize safety and promote consistency in visual warnings. Scheduled for January 23, 2026, the webinar aims to educate attendees on the crucial role of warnings in enhancing safety standards, with insights from industry experts. Don't miss this opportunity to gain valuable knowledge.

data.title: Secretary Wright approves backup generation for data centers ahead of Winter Storm Fern. Compass Datacenters in support.
data.description: In Dallas on January 22, 2026, Compass Datacenters expressed full support for Secretary Wright's authorization permitting data centers to employ backup power generation in preparation for an unprecedented winter storm projected to affect a significant portion of the nation. This decision grants Compass the ability to ensure operational continuity and safeguard essential data infrastructure amidst the challenging weather conditions.

data.title: AVAX could reach $14.50 by February upon defending key support at $12.08 & current levels near $12.36. Technicals support potential recovery.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently at a crucial support level of $12.08. Technical analysis points towards a possible uptrend, with a potential price target of $14.50 in the next 4 weeks if buyers maintain the current support level of around $12.36.
